error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: Invalid argument error in HTTP Request node
symptom: The workflow executes successfully but throws a 'Bad request - please check your parameters' error on the last step.
applies_when: Multiple inputs connected to the node
not_this_if: Only one input is connected to the HTTP Request node
root_cause: The HTTP Request node is receiving multiple inputs, one of which has an incorrect data structure. This leads to a conflict where the node cannot process the request correctly, resulting in a 400 error due to invalid arguments.
fix_steps: Identify and remove the unnecessary connection to the HTTP Request node
Ensure only the correct input is connected to the node
Save the workflow and re-execute it
agent_instruction: Remove the extra connection to the HTTP Request node that is not needed.
